reference: I just noticed my four-month-old's vaginal area is now showing an opening, a little hole that wasn't open before. Should she have an opening already? She strains a lot and stays tense or stiff trying to do a lot of things her body isn't ready for yet. My point is, if this isn't normal, would straining cause it? She had a very hard bowel movement last night and cried during it.
text: I just noticed my four-month-old vaginal area is now showing an opening, a little hole that wasn't open before. Does she have an opening already? She's strained a lot in stage 10, or fifth, trying to do a lot of things her body isn't ready for yet. My point is, this is abnormal. She's straining positive. She had a very hard bowel movement last night and tried very hard.
